title: Detailed Impact Report
subtitle: A comprehensive breakdown of how your contributions are providing essential support, relief, and reconstruction across Ukraine.
medicalAidDesc: Trauma kits, ambulances, and hospital infrastructure support.
foodDesc: Emergency food parcels and community water filtration systems.
housingDesc: Repairing damaged homes and building modular shelters.
educationDesc: Bomb shelter classrooms and essential transportation networks.
contributionsDesc: A transparent view of where our funds are actively deployed.
togetherDesc: Our mission is far from over. Join thousands of others in rebuilding Ukraine and providing life-saving support where it's needed most.
